parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  run_date,
  period_start,
  period_end,
  full_markdown,
  linkedin_post_text
FROM digests
WHERE published_at IS NULL
ORDER BY run_date DESC;

parameters.documentURL: ={{ $node["Create Google Doc digest"].json["documentId"] || $node["Create Google Doc digest"].json["id"] }}

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  s.*, 
  d.dominant_topic, 
  d.topic_category,
  d.period_start,
  d.period_end,
  string_agg(DISTINCT src.name, ', ' ORDER BY src.name) as source_names
FROM infographic_styles s 
JOIN digests d ON s.topic_category = d.topic_category 
JOIN items i ON i.published_at::date >= d.period_start 
             AND i.published_at::date <= d.period_end
JOIN sources src ON src.id = i.source_id
WHERE d.id = $1 
GROUP BY s.id, s.topic_category, s.base_prompt, s.primary_color, s.secondary_color, 
         s.accent_color, s.created_at, d.dominant_topic, d.topic_category, 
         d.period_start, d.period_end
LIMIT 1;

parameters.subject: ={{ $('Split Markdown').item.json.topic_emoji }} LinkedIn draft – {{ $('Split Markdown').item.json.topic_category }} Digest {{ $('Split Markdown').item.json.id }}
parameters.message:
=

{{ $('Split Markdown').first().json.topic_emoji }} {{ $('Split Markdown').first().json.topic_category }} Digest – {{ $('Split Markdown').first().json.period_display }}

Digest ID: {{ $('Split Markdown').first().json.id }}
Notion page: Open in Notion
Google Doc: Open in Google Docs
Theme: {{ $('Split Markdown').first().json.dominant_topic }}

LinkedIn draft proposal:

{{ $('Split Markdown').first().json.linkedin_post_text }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE digests
SET published_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id, published_at;
